GMTimeClock.resetDialog.title: Reset Game Time Clock
GMTimeClock.resetDialog.step1Label: Select which timer you want to reset. This action cannot be undone.
GMTimeClock.resetDialog.optionGMWithPlay: Reset GM and player online time
GMTimeClock.resetDialog.step2Warning: You are about to reset the selected timer(s). This cannot be undone.
GMTimeClock.resetDialog.onlyGM: Only GMs can reset the game time clocks.
GMTimeClock.resetMenu.title: Reset Game Time Clock
GMTimeClock.resetMenu.name: Reset timers
GMTimeClock.resetMenu.label: Reset Game Time Clock
GMTimeClock.resetMenu.hint: Open a dialog to reset the GM, GM+Player, or combat timers. This cannot be undone.
GMTimeClock.resetMenu.description: Click the button below to open the reset dialog for the Game Time Clock module.
GMTimeClock.resetMenu.note: Resetting timers is permanent and cannot be undone. A two-step confirmation dialog will be shown.
